across.clue: Badly means in a bad or unsatisfactory way.
A barber is a person whose job is to cut men’s hair.
to protect someone against a particular disease by injecting a medicine containing a small amount of the disease into them so that their body becomes immune to it.
To bloom is to produce an open flower.
An apprentice is a person who learns how to do a job from a skilled person.
Cement is a powder that is mixed with water and sand to make concrete.
An object is a non-living thing that you can see or touch.
Identity is who a person is.

down.clue: An outlook is a person’s opinion or way of thinking about something.
Marble is a type of rock that feels cold and is smooth when cut.
a very small individual piece of a substance such as sand salt or sugar.
the way that someone or something behaves.
A formal thing is official or serious.
A helicopter is a flying machine with large blades that spin.
Someone’s attitude is the way they feel and think.
Especially means particularly or above all.
A category is a group of things that share similar qualities.
To confer with someone means to discuss something with them to make a decision.
Freight is a set of items carried on a train, boat, or airplane.
An alien is a creature from a different world.
